result.reason: Implement new functionality to merge multiple connection configuration files and automatically export the current configuration.
result.approach: Add new methods to manage the merging of connection configurations from various sources and implement an auto-export mechanism to periodically save the active configuration to a predefined or user-specified location. This will likely involve modifications to configuration loading/saving logic and new UI elements to initiate these actions.
